name: New or Modified Inbox Rules in Exchange
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event matches Affected Workload (custom) is any of Exchange
when the event matches Operation (custom) is any of [New-InboxRule or Set-InboxRule]
TD_list: APPLY New or Modified Inbox Rules in Exchange on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event matches Affected Workload (custom) is any of Exchange
AND when the event matches Operation (custom) is any of [New-InboxRule or Set-InboxRule]
RED_list: Event name: Added or Modified Inbox Rules in Exchange
Event description: Detect New or Modified Inbox Rules in Exchange.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
Include detected events by "Username" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
